rationale: The 2022 paper cites Zhu, Chen, and Dasgupta (2008) mainly as one item in a grouped review of product-upgrade studies and in Table 1 that catalogs prior work. Its role is to show what prior upgrade research examined (trade-in effects on willingness to pay) while motivating a different question about ownership status and brand preference. The citing paper does not derive a specific hypothesis from Zhu et al., reuse its mechanism or method, or directly test/interpret results against it.
